title: Escape from Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Spandam, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Spandam, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bon-chan stayed at Impel down by himself!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I'm the best one for the job!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I'll open the gates of justice!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: But after that... what will you do...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Do you really want to know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Not until the line is cut.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: This small Dender mushi's range is short...!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I took your face into my memory!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Hey!! Can you hear me!? Bon-chan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: weren't we going to escape together!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: you....!! you were always saving me!!!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Spandam, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: key exchange.
